name: pi-tmux-task
description: A minimal tmux-based task manager for agents, with skills and notifications only.

scripts.check: ./test/tmux-integration.sh && node --experimental-strip-types ./test/context.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./test/events.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./test/stale.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./test/index-functions.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types ./test/tasks-panel-static.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types -e "import('./src/index.ts')"
